revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[fr:Duì]][[ja:兌]][[ko:태 (괘)]][[nl:Meer (trigram)]][[pt:Duì (I Ching)]][[zh-min-nan:Tōe-kòa]][[zh-yue:兌卦]][[zh:兌卦]]


{{Bagua|qq=}}
'''Dui''' (兌, Duì) is one of the {{ill|Bagua|en|Bagua|qid=Q340846|lt=Bagua|1=Bagua}}. Its trigram form is {{resize|125%|'''☱'''|qq=}} with the first and second {{ill|Yao (lines)|ja|爻|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yao (lines)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yao (lines)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yao (lines)|qq=}} being Yang (⚊) and the third Yao being Yin (⚋). It is also one of the {{ill|Hexagram (I Ching)|en|Hexagram (I Ching)|qid=Q1572403|lt=Sixty-Four Hexagrams|1=Hexagram (I Ching)}}, known as {{ill|Dui as Marsh|ja|兌|1=Duì (Bagua)|2=ja|3=兌|4=zh-yue|5=兌卦|6=ko|7=태 (괘)|8=fr|9=Duì|10=nl|11=Meer (trigram)|12=pt|13=Duì (I Ching)|14=zh-min-nan|15=Tōe-kòa|lt=Dui (兌)|1=Duì (Bagua)|2=ja|3=兌|4=zh-yue|5=兌卦|6=ko|7=태 (괘)|8=fr|9=Duì|10=nl|11=Meer (trigram)|12=pt|13=Duì (I Ching)|14=zh-min-nan|15=Tōe-kòa|lt=Dui (兌)|1=Duì (Bagua)|lt=Dui為沢|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dui as Marsh|13=User:Immanuelle/Duì (Bagua)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dui as Marsh|13=User:Immanuelle/Duì (Bagua)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dui as Marsh|13=User:Immanuelle/Duì (Bagua)|qq=}}, consisting of Dui below and Dui above. According to the {{ill|Tuan Zhuan|ja|彖伝|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tuan Zhuan|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tuan Zhuan|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tuan Zhuan|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, the name *Dui* (兌) carries the meaning of *joy* (説, よろこぶ).
== Trigram Symbolism ==
According to the {{ill|Shuo Gua Zhuan|ja|説卦伝|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shuo Gua Zhuan|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shuo Gua Zhuan|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shuo Gua Zhuan|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, the Dui trigram symbolizes {{ill|marshes|ja|沢|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/marshes|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/marshes|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/marshes|1=sawa|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11553102}}, young girls, joy (*説*, よろこぶ), {{ill|Sheep|en|Sheep|qid=Q7368|lt=sheep|1=Sheep}}, {{ill|Mouth|en|Mouth|qid=Q9635|lt=mouth|1=Mouth}}, and the {{ill|West|en|West|qid=Q679|lt=west|1=West}}<ref>「[https://www.ndl.go.jp/koyomi/chapter3/s2.html 干支2方位神]」National Diet Library, accessed December 16, 2021.</ref>. In the {{ill|Earthly Branches|ja|地支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earthly Branches|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earthly Branches|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earthly Branches|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 十二支|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 十二支|1=Earthly Branches|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1072961}}, it corresponds to {{ill|Rooster (zodiac)|en|Rooster (zodiac)|qid=Q822621|lt=Rooster (酉)|1=Rooster (zodiac)}}.
In the {{ill|Na Jia|ja|納甲|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Na Jia|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Na Jia|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Na Jia|qq=}} system, Dui is associated with {{ill|Ding (Heavenly Stem)|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding (Heavenly Stem)|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding (Heavenly Stem)|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding (Heavenly Stem)|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}, the Fire element in {{ill|Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|en|Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|qid=Q218652|lt=Five Elements (Wuxing)|1=Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)}}, and the {{ill|South|en|South|qid=Q667|lt=south|1=South}} among the {{ill|Cardinal direction|en|Cardinal direction|qid=Q23718|lt=Five Directions|1=Cardinal direction}}.
== Earlier Heaven Arrangement ==
In the {{ill|Fuxi Earlier Heaven Bagua|ja|伏羲先天八卦|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fuxi Earlier Heaven Bagua|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fuxi Earlier Heaven Bagua|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fuxi Earlier Heaven Bagua|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135491528|1=Fuxi Earlier Heaven Bagua}}, Dui is the second in sequence and is positioned as one of the four corner trigrams, representing {{ill|southeast|ja|南東|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/southeast|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/southeast|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/southeast|comment=changed title based on wikidata|comment=enwiki is a redirect|1=Southeast|qid=Q6452640}}. In terms of Yin-Yang transformation, it has two Yang lines and is one step before the fully Yang {{ill|Qian|ja|乾|1=Qián (Bagua)|2=ja|3=乾|lt=Qian (乾)|1=Qián (Bagua)|lt=Qian|lt=Qian (乾)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Qian|13=User:Immanuelle/Qián (Bagua)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Qian|13=User:Immanuelle/Qián (Bagua)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Qian|13=User:Immanuelle/Qián (Bagua)|qq=}} trigram.
== Idioms and Classical Sayings ==
*"When two marshes come together, they form Dui. A noble person thus engages in discussion and learning with friends." (*Xiang Zhuan* 象伝) – Just as two marshes nourish each other, noble individuals refine their knowledge and character through scholarly discussions with their friends.
== Nine Stars Comparison Chart ==
